search_signals.author: Route2FI
search_signals.text: "A completely unsaturated market on Polymarket is the "Bitcoin up or down" 15 min. Every 15 min you get a price to beat, in this screenshot: $101,747. So you can bet up if you think the price will be higher, or bet down if you think it will be lower. At the start of the bet, on the 15 min left mark, it should be a breakeven bet (50/50).
